since_last: 76% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.39%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 76% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.67% · BTC +0.82% · Gold +1.62% · Nasdaq100 +1.51%. 76% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.39%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.39%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.07%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +10.80%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +10.80%, SYNA +8.41%, MU +7.67%, LSCC +7.41%, AMD +7.22%. Laggards: AVAV -5.15%, PLTR -4.21%, SOUN -3.38%, IBM -2.54%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.43% at $150.42
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.43% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
